schemas.definition: z.object({ status: z.enum(['active','cancelled','completed']).optional(), programId: z.string().optional(), paymentStatus: z.enum(['pending','paid','partial','waived']).optional(), search: z.string().optional(), page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1), limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(25) })

z.object({ enrollments: z.array(z.object({ enrollmentId: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), parentEmail: z.string().email(), childName: z.string(), childAge: z.number().int(), programId: z.string(), programName: z.string(), status: z.enum(['active','cancelled','completed']), paymentStatus: z.enum(['pending','paid','partial','waived']), totalDue: z.number(), amountReceived: z.number(), enrolledAt: z.string().datetime() })), total: z.number(), page: z.number(), limit: z.number() })

z.object({ enrollmentId: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), parentEmail: z.string().email(), parentPhone: z.string(), childName: z.string(), childAge: z.number().int(), programId: z.string(), programName: z.string(), programSchedule: z.string(), location: z.string(), status: z.enum(['active','cancelled','completed']), paymentStatus: z.enum(['pending','paid','partial','waived']), totalDue: z.number(), amountReceived: z.number(), remainingBalance: z.number(), priceBreakdown: z.array(z.object({ label: z.string(), amount: z.number() })), couponApplied: z.string().nullable(), leadId: z.string().nullable(), trialId: z.string().nullable(), cancellationReason: z.string().nullable(), enrolledAt: z.string().datetime(), updatedAt: z.string().datetime() })

z.object({ status: z.enum(['active','cancelled','completed']), cancellationReason: z.string().optional() }).refine(data => data.status !== 'cancelled' || (data.cancellationReason && data.cancellationReason.length > 0), { message: 'Cancellation reason is required when cancelling' })

z.object({ programs: z.array(z.object({ programId: z.string(), name: z.string(), ageGroupMin: z.number(), ageGroupMax: z.number(), schedule: z.string(), totalFee: z.number(), trialAvailable: z.boolean(), isFull: z.boolean(), enrollmentOpen: z.boolean() })) })

z.object({ programId: z.string(), name: z.string(), ageGroupMin: z.number(), ageGroupMax: z.number(), totalSessions: z.number(), sessionDuration: z.number(), location: z.string(), startDate: z.string().datetime(), endDate: z.string().datetime(), totalFee: z.number(), registrationFee: z.number().nullable(), registrationFeeRequired: z.boolean(), trialAvailable: z.boolean(), isFull: z.boolean(), enrollmentOpen: z.boolean() })

z.object({ programId: z.string(), parentName: z.string().min(1), email: z.string().email(), phone: z.string().min(1), childName: z.string().min(1), childAge: z.number().int().min(0).max(18), trialDateId: z.string() })
z.object({ trialId: z.string(), programName: z.string(), trialDate: z.string().datetime(), parentName: z.string(), childName: z.string(), confirmationEmailSent: z.boolean(), message: z.string() })

z.object({ programFee: z.number(), registrationFee: z.number().nullable(), couponDiscount: z.number(), couponAppliedTo: z.enum(['program_fee','registration_fee','both']).nullable(), totalDue: z.number(), breakdown: z.array(z.object({ label: z.string(), amount: z.number() })) })

z.object({ programId: z.string(), parentName: z.string().min(1), email: z.string().email(), phone: z.string().min(1), childName: z.string().min(1), childAge: z.number().int().min(0).max(18), couponCode: z.string().optional() })

z.object({ enrollmentId: z.string(), programName: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), childName: z.string(), totalDue: z.number(), paymentStatus: z.literal('pending'), confirmationEmailSent: z.boolean() })

z.object({ enrollmentId: z.string(), programName: z.string(), parentName: z.string(), childName: z.string(), childAge: z.number(), schedule: z.string(), location: z.string(), totalDue: z.number(), priceBreakdown: z.array(z.object({ label: z.string(), amount: z.number() })), paymentStatus: z.string(), zelleInstructions: z.object({ recipientName: z.string(), contactInfo: z.string(), amount: z.number(), referenceNote: z.string(), customInstructions: z.string().nullable() }) })
